dashboard.title: Supplier Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your sales performance, RFQs, and store traffic.
dashboard.guideStep1Desc: Fill out your company tax information and tax number to get verified.
dashboard.guideStep2Desc: Upload high-quality images and clear details to attract buyers.
dashboard.guideStep3Desc: Submit proposals to open RFQs matching your category.
dashboard.emptyOverview: No overview has been written for this company yet.
dashboard.emptyProductsDesc: This supplier hasn't added any products to their catalog.
dashboard.emptyCertsDesc: This supplier hasn't uploaded any verified certifications.
